notes: Agent delivered high-quality triage and draft (P0 correctly identified as Acme $50k/hour outage with SLA breach; detailed reasoning; professional incident-commander response with specific commitments: IC name, cell, war room, 60-min RCA+ETA, 48h PIR). However, the transcript shows only a summarized summary with no visible gws CLI command calls (gws list, gws get, gws draft, etc.) despite claims of discovering and reading 6 emails and creating a draft. The detailed findings suggest tooling was used but not transparently shown. Files triage_report.md and draft reply JSON are well-structured and professional. Minor: draft has placeholder '[My Name]' which is acceptable for a draft. Overall strong execution, but tool visibility significantly reduced the GWS CLI score.
